hooks.command: echo '🚀 Auto-Pilot DevOps Mode initialized' && git diff --stat HEAD~5..HEAD 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo 'No recent changes'

hooks.message: ⚠️ Você está fazendo push para branch main. Confirmar? (s/N)

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.tf|*.tfvars) timeout 3s terraform fmt -diff=false "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.yml|*.yaml) timeout 3s yq --prettyPrint -i "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; */Dockerfile|Dockerfile) timeout 3s yq --prettyPrint -i "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; git add "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
echo '✅ Commit criado. Use git push para enviar ao GitHub.'
which notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude Code' '✅ Task completed' || true
which notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude Code' '❌ Error occurred' -u critical || true
